metadata.title: Stealthy Mid Flank Turns Into a Clean Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch this smooth mid flank where sharp aim and timing secure two quick kills. How do you like to surprise your opponents in VALORANT?

Share your favorite sneaky plays below!

Drop your best flank moments in the comments!
